summary_one_line_zh: 训练正从“答对”转向“为搜索和自改写服务”，同时硬件成本开始反向塑形产品。
summary_one_line_en: Training shifts toward search-ready and self-modifying models, while hardware costs start reshaping products.

items.title_zh: 为测试时搜索训练多样性
items.why_zh: 不是单次推理更强，而是让模型在AlphaEvolve式搜索里更可被筛选，直接影响训练目标设计。
items.why_en: Not just better single-shot answers: it makes models more searchable under AlphaEvolve-style inference search.
items.so_what_zh: 把评测加上search budget，看你的模型是否越搜越强而非越搜越同质。
items.so_what_en: Add search-budget evals; check whether more search improves quality or just homogenizes outputs.

items.title_zh: 代理系统开始自我改写
items.title_en: Agents that rewrite their own source
items.why_zh: 把线上失败闭环从“人改代码”推进到“系统自修复候选”，会重塑agent运维和安全边界。
items.why_en: Moves failure recovery from human patching toward self-repair candidates, changing agent ops and safety boundaries.
items.so_what_zh: 给你的agent加一条只读回放+自动补丁草案链路，先在人审下跑自修复闭环。
items.so_what_en: Add a replay-to-patch-draft loop under human review before enabling any autonomous fixes.

items.title_zh: 内存短缺开始抬高终端成本
items.title_en: Memory shortage is repricing consumer hardware
items.why_zh: 算力不再只看GPU，内存供给开始影响端侧与本地部署的BOM、毛利和出货节奏。
items.why_en: Compute economics now include memory supply, affecting BOM, margins, and shipping for on-device/local deployments.
items.so_what_zh: 重新核一遍本季度设备方案：RAM/显存采购、缓存策略、量化方案是否还成立。
items.so_what_en: Recheck this quarter’s device plan: RAM/VRAM procurement, caching strategy, and quantization assumptions.
